message.content:
In /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/crgv.validate.sh, transform all 12 instances of `&& return 0` to inverted-test `|| return 0`.

The patterns are:
- `test "$min" = "0" -a -z "$val" && return 0` → `test "$min" != "0" -o -n "$val" || return 0` (lines 36, 57, 80)
- `test -z "$val" && return 0` → `test -n "$val" || return 0` (lines 107, 129, 147, 165, 183, 201)
- `test -z "$val" && return 0  # Empty lists allowed` → `test -n "$val" || return 0  # Empty lists allowed` (lines 210, 224, 238)

Read the file first, then make all edits. Do not change anything else.

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→

    18→
    19→# Configuration Regime Validate Library
    20→
    21→# Core error handling
    22→crgv_print_and_die() {
    23→    echo "ERROR: $*" >&2
    24→    exit 1
    25→}
    26→
    27→# String validator with optional length constraints
    28→crgv_string() {
    29→    local context=$1
    30→    local varname=$2
    31→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
    32→    local min=$3
    33→    local max=$4
    34→
    35→    # Allow empty if min=0
    36→    test "$min" = "0" -a -z "$val" && return 0
    37→
    38→    # Otherwise must not be empty
    39→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
    40→
    41→    # Check length constraints if max provided
    42→    if [ -n "$max" ]; then
    43→        test ${#val} -ge $min || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be at least $min chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    44→        test ${#val} -le $max || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be no more than $max chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    45→    fi
    46→}
    47→
    48→# Cross-context name validator (system-safe identifier)
    49→crgv_xname() {
    50→    local context=$1
    51→    local varname=$2
    52→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
    53→    local min=$3
    54→    local max=$4
    55→
    56→    # Allow empty if min=0
    57→    test "$min" = "0" -a -z "$val" && return 0
    58→
    59→    # Otherwise must not be empty
    60→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
    61→
    62→    # Check length constraints
    63→    test ${#val} -ge $min || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be at least $min chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    64→    test ${#val} -le $max || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be no more than $max chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    65→
    66→    # Must start with letter and contain only allowed chars
    67→    test $(echo "$val" | grep -E '^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*$') || \
    68→        crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must start with letter and contain only letters, numbers, underscore, hyphen, got '$val'"
    69→}
    70→
    71→# Fully Qualified Image Name component validator
    72→crgv_fqin() {
    73→    local context=$1
    74→    local varname=$2
    75→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
    76→    local min=$3
    77→    local max=$4
    78→
    79→    # Allow empty if min=0
    80→    test "$min" = "0" -a -z "$val" && return 0
    81→
    82→    # Otherwise must not be empty
    83→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
    84→
    85→    # Check length constraints
    86→    test ${#val} -ge $min || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be at least $min chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    87→    test ${#val} -le $max || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be no more than $max chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    88→
    89→    # Allow letters, numbers, dots, hyphens, underscores, forward slashes, colons
    90→    test $(echo "$val" | grep -E '^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9:._/-]*$') || \
    91→        crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must start with letter/number and contain only letters, numbers, colons, dots, underscores, hyphens, forward slashes, got '$val'"
    92→}
    93→
    94→crgv_bool() {
    95→    local context=$1
    96→    local varname=$2
    97→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
    98→
    99→    test "$val" = "0" -o "$val" = "1" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be 0 or 1, got: '$val'"
   100→}
   101→
   102→crgv_opt_bool() {
   103→    local context=$1
   104→    local varname=$2
   105→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   106→
   107→    test -z "$val" && return 0
   108→    test "$val" = "0" -o "$val" = "1" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must be 0 or 1, got: '$val'"
   109→}
   110→
   111→crgv_decimal() {
   112→    local context=$1
   113→    local varname=$2
   114→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   115→    local min=$3
   116→    local max=$4
   117→
   118→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
   119→    test $val -ge $min -a $val -le $max || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname value '$val' must be between $min and $max"
   120→}
   121→
   122→crgv_opt_range() {
   123→    local context=$1
   124→    local varname=$2
   125→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   126→    local min=$3
   127→    local max=$4
   128→
   129→    test -z "$val" && return 0
   130→    test $val -ge $min -a $val -le $max || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname value '$val' must be between $min and $max"
   131→}
   132→
   133→crgv_ipv4() {
   134→    local context=$1
   135→    local varname=$2
   136→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   137→
   138→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
   139→    test $(echo $val | grep -E '^([0-9]{1,3}\.){3}[0-9]{1,3}$') || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname has invalid IPv4 format: '$val'"
   140→}
   141→
   142→crgv_opt_ipv4() {
   143→    local context=$1
   144→    local varname=$2
   145→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   146→
   147→    test -z "$val" && return 0
   148→    test $(echo $val | grep -E '^([0-9]{1,3}\.){3}[0-9]{1,3}$') || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname has invalid IPv4 format: '$val'"
   149→}
   150→
   151→crgv_cidr() {
   152→    local context=$1
   153→    local varname=$2
   154→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   155→
   156→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
   157→    test $(echo $val | grep -E '^[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}/[0-9]{1,2}$') || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname has invalid CIDR format: '$val'"
   158→}
   159→
   160→crgv_opt_cidr() {
   161→    local context=$1
   162→    local varname=$2
   163→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   164→
   165→    test -z "$val" && return 0
   166→    test $(echo $val | grep -E '^[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}/[0-9]{1,2}$') || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname has invalid CIDR format: '$val'"
   167→}
   168→
   169→crgv_domain() {
   170→    local context=$1
   171→    local varname=$2
   172→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   173→
   174→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
   175→    test $(echo $val | grep -E '^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9\.-]*[a-zA-Z0-9]$') || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname has invalid domain format: '$val'"
   176→}
   177→
   178→crgv_opt_domain() {
   179→    local context=$1
   180→    local varname=$2
   181→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   182→
   183→    test -z "$val" && return 0
   184→    test $(echo $val | grep -E '^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9\.-]*[a-zA-Z0-9]$') || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname has invalid domain format: '$val'"
   185→}
   186→
   187→crgv_port() {
   188→    local context=$1
   189→    local varname=$2
   190→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   191→
   192→    test -n "$val" || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
   193→    test $val -ge 1 -a $val -le 65535 || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname value '$val' must be between 1 and 65535"
   194→}
   195→
   196→crgv_opt_port() {
   197→    local context=$1
   198→    local varname=$2
   199→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   200→
   201→    test -z "$val" && return 0
   202→    test $val -ge 1 -a $val -le 65535 || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname value '$val' must be between 1 and 65535"
   203→}
   204→
   205→crgv_list_ipv4() {
   206→    local context=$1
   207→    local varname=$2
   208→    eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || crgv_print_and_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
   209→
   210→    test -z "$val" && return 0  # Empty lists allowed
   211→
   212→    local item_num=0
   213→    for item in $val; do

   215→        test $(echo $item | grep -E '^([0-9]{1,3}\.){3}[0-9]{1,3}$') || crgv_print_and_die "[$context] $varname item #$item_num has invalid IPv4 format: '$item'"

   230→    done
